mapper.delete: DELETE FROM nursing_task WHERE status = 1 AND task_type = 2 AND ( EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM elder e WHERE e.id = nursing_task.elder_id AND e.status = 5 ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM contract c WHERE c.elder_id = nursing_task.elder_id AND c.status IN (2, 3) AND c.create_time = ( SELECT MAX(c2.create_time) FROM contract c2 WHERE c2.elder_id = nursing_task.elder_id ) ) )
mapper.select: SELECT nt.id, nt.nursing_id, nt.project_id, nt.elder_id, nt.task_type, nt.estimated_server_time, nt.real_server_time, nt.mark, nt.cancel_reason, nt.status, nt.rel_no, nt.task_image, nt.create_time, nt.update_time, nt.create_by, nt.update_by, nt.remark, e.name AS elder_name, e.id_card_no, e.image, e.sex, cc.nursing_level_name AS lname, COALESCE(nt.bed_number, e.bed_number, b.bed_number) AS bed_number, np.name AS project_name, su_create.real_name AS creator, su_update.real_name AS updater FROM nursing_task nt LEFT JOIN elder e ON nt.elder_id = e.id LEFT JOIN bed b ON e.bed_id = b.id LEFT JOIN nursing_project np ON nt.project_id = np.id LEFT JOIN sys_user su_create ON nt.create_by = su_create.id LEFT JOIN sys_user su_update ON nt.update_by = su_update.id LEFT JOIN check_in ci ON ci.elder_id = nt.elder_id AND ci.status = 0 LEFT JOIN check_in_config cc ON cc.check_in_code = ci.check_in_code WHERE nt.id = #{id}
